intentSynonyms: get a project pull request in meticulous
look up a project pull request in meticulous
fetch a single project pull request in meticulous
view one specific project pull request in meticulous
get project pull request in meticulous
get pr test status in meticulous
description: Get the Meticulous test status for a specific pull request by its hosting provider ID (e.g., GitHub PR number).

pull_request_id.description: Hosting provider PR identifier (e.g., GitHub PR number as string)
